message:
refactor: idiomatic error matching and stream safety across connectors

Connector test improvements (anthropic, discord, openai, telegram):
- Replace match+panic! with assert!(matches!()) + if-let for cleaner
  test assertions that produce better error messages on failure.
- telegram/connector.rs: replace unwrap() on config.token with
  explicit None handling that returns a proper InvalidRequest error
  instead of panicking at runtime.
- twitter/connector.rs: fix potential stream_active flag leak — move
  the flag set inside the should_start block and reset it on connect
  failure, preventing the flag from being stuck true after an error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
